cards.scientific_summary: This 58-residue candidate has a strongly cationic, moderately hydrophobic profile with a leucine-rich motif and moderate aromatic/proline content. These features are consistent with an antimicrobial-peptide candidate, but the evidence is computational, uncalibrated, and lacks supporting assay-neighbor data. Protease susceptibility and developability uncertainty are the main preliminary concerns.
